I agree that mucocutaneous circumoral pigmentation is characteristic of Peutz-Jeghers syndrome for several reasons. First, it is indeed a defining sign specifically linked to this condition, which involves benign hamartomatous intestinal polyposis often accompanied by oral mucosal freckling around the lips.
